title: koellia albescens
intro: Koellia albescens, also known as Koellia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Koellia albescens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve digestive health. In herbal preparations, Koellia albescens can be found in various forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
